phase: OCLM AI Command Lineage Profile Phase AI-A
status: formal-boundary definition; AI-specific proofs not yet complete

assumptions.name: symbolic cryptographic abstraction
assumptions.implementation_obligation: select concrete primitives, signatures, hashes, encodings, and domain separation that preserve the symbolic distinctions

assumptions.name: root authorities and compromise events are explicitly modeled
assumptions.implementation_obligation: inventory human, institutional, agent, verifier, gateway, tool, and witness authority keys and compromise paths

assumptions.name: scope inclusion predicates correctly represent target, space, time, capability, resource, and context restrictions
assumptions.implementation_obligation: define canonical machine-readable scope semantics and reject ambiguous widening

assumptions.name: the execution gateway deterministically enforces Action Certificates
assumptions.implementation_obligation: ensure tools, credentials, networks, filesystems, APIs, and resources cannot be reached through an ungoverned bypass

assumptions.name: security-relevant event order and time-window state are preserved
assumptions.implementation_obligation: provide monotonic ordering, trusted clocks or epochs, and stale-certificate rejection

assumptions.name: revocation state is monotonic except under explicitly modeled compromise
assumptions.implementation_obligation: propagate revocation to gateways and invalidate active or cached certificates according to a declared policy

assumptions.name: required external observations satisfy the modeled witness predicates
assumptions.implementation_obligation: define and audit network, runtime, tool, resource, and execution evidence sources

assumptions.name: implementation events faithfully refine model events
assumptions.implementation_obligation: prove or audit serialization, event mapping, state transitions, certificate checks, argument binding, receipt generation, and bypass absence

not_established: truth of every physical or external observation
elimination of covert channels and side channels
exhaustion of every possible AI-agent attack
